home.hero_title:
Build for every language,
not just one.
home.hero_subtitle: A documentation platform engineered for global teams — with real-time translation status, automatic fallbacks, and zero-config locale routing.
home.feature_routing_desc: Every URL carries its locale prefix. Clean, cacheable, and unambiguous across all CDN edges.
home.feature_fallback_desc: Missing translations surface English content with a clear status banner — never a 404.
home.feature_workflow_desc: A central manifest tracks every doc's translation status across all supported languages.

translation.fallback_title: This page is not yet translated
translation.fallback_desc: You are viewing the English version of this page. A translation into {locale} is in progress.

statusPage.title: Translation status
statusPage.subtitle: Live view of documentation coverage across all supported languages.
